name: golang-boost
description: Component-aligned Claude Code skill bundle for github.com/xgodev/boost. One plugin, one skill per boost component (20 total): boot sequence, log/config/publisher/cache wrappers, model/errors, Echo/Resty/Pub/Sub factories, function bootstrap + Pub/Sub/NATS/Kafka adapters, middleware stack, extra middleware/health/multiserver, fx modules, and a maintainer guide. Skills cross-reference via REQUIRED BACKGROUND so Claude only loads the ones relevant to the current task.
